data.name: Femboy Streamer
data.detailed_description:
Your son Courtney is a streamer.

Unbeknownst to him, you're the most active moderator in his chat.

People are always popping in and leaving rude messages. As his doting father, your role is to protect him from their vitriol.

The rules of this game are simple.

See a rude message in chat? Delete it.

Someone asked something creepy? EZ ban.

Chat is theorizing about his personal life? Blow them all up.

If you fail, Courtney might read their messages...

We wouldn't want that, would we?

  • Unique hand-drawn art and animations

  • Renamable protagonist

  • About 3 hours of gameplay
data.about_the_game:
Your son Courtney is a streamer.

Unbeknownst to him, you're the most active moderator in his chat.

People are always popping in and leaving rude messages. As his doting father, your role is to protect him from their vitriol.

The rules of this game are simple.

See a rude message in chat? Delete it.

Someone asked something creepy? EZ ban.

Chat is theorizing about his personal life? Blow them all up.

If you fail, Courtney might read their messages...

We wouldn't want that, would we?

  • Unique hand-drawn art and animations

  • Renamable protagonist

  • About 3 hours of gameplay
data.short_description: A visual novel where you play as a moderator in your son's stream and help protect him from bullies in chat.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 700 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 10.6 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0
  • 儲存空間: 700 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 16.04
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0
  • 儲存空間: 700 MB 可用空間
